SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-04-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR 30 DAYS. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 21, 2012 AND EVERY 30 DAYS THEREAFTER $250.00 UNTIL THE ENTIRE AMOUNT OF $2,620.00 IS PAID. IF ANY INSTALLMENT IS NOT PAID, PLAINTIFF MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR BALANCE OWING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
